amazon_side_asn.description: The Autonomous System Number (ASN) for the Amazon side of the gateway.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the transit gateway.

association_default_route_table_id.description: The default route table ID for associations.

auto_accept_shared_attachments.description: Indicates whether resource attachments are automatically accepted.

default_route_table_association.description: Indicates whether resource attachments are associated with the default route table.

default_route_table_propagation.description: Indicates whether resource attachments propagate routes to the default route table.

description.description: The description of the transit gateway.

dns_support.description: Indicates whether DNS support is enabled for the transit gateway.

id.description: The ID of the transit gateway.

multicast_support.description: Indicates whether multicast support is enabled for the transit gateway.

owner_id.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the transit gateway.

propagation_default_route_table_id.description: The default route table ID for propagation.

security_group_referencing_support.description: Indicates whether security group referencing is supported.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the transit gateway.

transit_gateway_cidr_blocks.description: A list of CIDR blocks for the transit gateway.

vpn_ecmp_support.description: Indicates whether VPN Equal Cost Multipath Protocol (ECMP) support is enabled.
